# programs.kiro-cli

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.kiro-cli`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.kiro-cli.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable kiro-cli, the command-line interface for Kiro. |
| `programs.kiro-cli.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.kiro-cli.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.kiro-cli.package` | `package` | The kiro-cli package to use. |
